rationale: Existing preprocess summaries suggest tennis rallies/serves, but they do not answer the count of net hits; retrieve dense-caption and preprocess text spans for the rally portions before planning new tool calls.

requests.need: Text spans describing each rally/serve outcome, especially whether the woman in white hits the ball into the net and how many times this occurs
requests.query: tennis woman in white hits into the net serve rally outcome net fault netted shot
